creator: empty.japan
caption:
Spending a few days in Kyoto has been absolutely amazing. While moving to Nagano was the right choice for me, Kyoto’s beauty amazes me as if it were the first time. 

Here are some of my favorite nearby spots: 

Uji (town of the best Matcha in Japan)
Kyoto by the Sea
Kayabuki no Sato
Kinosaki Onsen
Shiga Prefecture (Mount Hiei and Omihachiman)

You can find travel guides for ALL these amazing locations in my bio ❤️
